results.command: env OUT=artifacts/optimization/cod-pass43-reprofile-20260606Tpass43 SERVER=/tmp/codex-fr-pass43-profile-target/release-perf/frankenredis BENCH=/tmp/codex-fr-pass43-profile-target/release-perf/fr-bench PORT=20672 PREFIX=cod-pass43-expire-base bash -lc 'log="$OUT/paired-baseline-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --workload set --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/paired-baseline-set-p16-300k-last.json" --key-prefix "$PREFIX" >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'

env OUT=artifacts/optimization/cod-pass43-reprofile-20260606Tpass43 SERVER=/tmp/codex-fr-pass43-expire-candidate-target/release-perf/frankenredis BENCH=/tmp/codex-fr-pass43-expire-candidate-target/release-perf/fr-bench PORT=20673 PREFIX=cod-pass43-expire-cand bash -lc 'log="$OUT/paired-candidate-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$SERVER" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --mode strict >"$log" 2>&1 & pid=$!; cleanup(){ kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; for i in {1..100}; do grep -q ready "$log" && break; kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.05; done; grep -q ready "$log" || exit 1; "$BENCH" --host 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --workload set --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out "$OUT/paired-candidate-set-p16-300k-last.json" --key-prefix "$PREFIX" >/dev/null; cleanup; trap - EXIT'
